data.title: PROYA Showcases Multi-Brand Portfolio at Cosmoprof Worldwide Bologna
data.description: A Chinese cosmetics company, PROYA Cosmetics Co., Ltd., showcased its focus on science-driven products and commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) initiatives, as well as its adaptation to changing consumer preferences at the prestigious international beauty trade show held in BOLOGNA, Italy from March 26 to 28, 2026.

data.title: DOTT PUBLISHES Q4 AND FY 2025 FINANCIAL REPORT
data.description: In Amsterdam, on March 31, 2026, a recent report revealed significant achievements in financial performance. The company recorded a notable milestone with €7 million in Adjusted EBITDA for fiscal year 2025, marking its first instance of profitability. Notable improvements were seen in Q4, showcasing enhanced underlying economic factors and margins. Additionally, the positive trend continued into Q1 of 2026, with successful tender wins in various crucial cities. These wins amounted to a total of €85...

data.title: KuCoin settles with CFTC for $500K, ending case. Parent company pays fraction of $300M due to DOJ over similar charges.
data.description: The parent company of KuCoin has agreed to pay a settlement of $500,000 to address charges from the CFTC, which is significantly less than the $300 million settlement reached with the DOJ for comparable charges.

data.title: Ran Neuner believes Bitcoin's value is uncertain amid changing market dynamics, shifting focus from prices to macro factors.
data.description: Ran Neuner, the founder of Crypto Banter, mentioned that the clarity of Bitcoin's narrative has become more challenging to pinpoint. This shift in focus is reflected in investors moving away from concentrating solely on price predictions to considering broader macroeconomic factors and capital movements.

data.title: DOGE's price may hit $0.16-$0.175 by January 2026, consolidating at $0.09 with RSI at 45.67. Analysts anticipate a bullish trend.
data.description: Dogecoin is currently trading at $0.09, maintaining a steady position with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 45.67. Analysts predict a potential price recovery to a range of $0.16 to $0.175 in the upcoming weeks, as bullish reversal patterns catch their attention through technical analysis.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.26 rebound from $0.24 with RSI at 40.65. Potential resistance at 2-week high if support maintains.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano is currently trading at $0.24 with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 40.65, indicating potential for a bounce back from oversold conditions. Analysts predict that if the current support levels remain strong, there is a likelihood of a resistance test at $0.26 within the next two weeks based on technical analysis.

data.title: SOL price may reach $90-95 by April due to oversold indicators. Short-term target $86-88. Bullish breakout at $96.23.
data.description: Summary of SOL Price Predictions: The short-term target for SOL is between $86-88 within one week, and the medium-term forecast for the next month ranges between $90-95. The bullish breakout level is set at $96.23, which coincides with the Upper Bollinger Band. These predictions suggest potential upward movement in SOL's price in the near future.

data.title: Google has revised quantum computing estimates to crack crypto; far fewer qubits necessary than previously believed.
data.description: Google has revised its calculations on the quantum computing power required to compromise elliptic curve cryptography. The new estimates suggest a significantly higher amount of resources would be needed to achieve this, reflecting a change in the previous assumptions about the technology. This development underscores the increasing complexity and potential challenges in the field of quantum computing, highlighting the need for advanced security measures.

data.title: Dubai's VARA introduces rules for crypto exchange-traded derivatives, enabling retail access with suitability checks and limits.
data.description: Dubai's Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority (VARA) has established regulations for cryptocurrency exchange-traded derivatives. These rules permit retail investors to participate after passing suitability assessments, adhering to specified margin restrictions, and abiding by leverage limits.

data.title: XRP price may hit $1.98 in technical consolidation. Short-term target: $1.36-$1.39. Medium-term forecast: $1.28-$1.53. Bullish breakout at $1.53. Support at $1.28.
data.description: Forecast for XRP price indicates a short-term target of $1.36-$1.39 within a week, and a medium-term range of $1.28-$1.53 over a month. A bullish breakout is anticipated at $1.53, while critical support is identified at $1.28.

data.title: NetDragon Upgraded to "A" by MSCI ESG Rating
data.description: Global capital markets have acknowledged the efforts of NetDragon Websoft Holdings Limited in sustainability and corporate responsibility. The Hong Kong-based company, identified by the stock code 777, is a prominent player in fostering internet communities. This recognition comes as of March 31, 2026, highlighting the growing importance of environmental and social initiatives within the business world.

data.title: Quadient Collaborates with Lush Cosmetics to Transform Accounts Payable Operations with its AP Automation Software
data.description: A popular UK-based retailer, Lush, has chosen Quadient's Accounts Payable (AP) automation software to enhance and simplify its financial processes. This decision marks a strategic move towards modernizing and optimizing the company's finance operations.
Nordic property fund, eQ Community Properties, gets Baa3 rating from Moody's with stable outlook - a first in the region.
